text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun is running in a scrimmage today.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Trainer! What's the strategy for today?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Should I zoom forward from behind? Or run at the
speed of sound and leave everyone in my vapor
trail?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Like, really?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ☆ Yay! This calls for a change of plans!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No target for today! I'll come from the outside
and blow past everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's changed her strategy right before a race
just like this numerous times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Most racers usually get stuck in the rut of their
usual tactics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As they experience more and more races, they
establish their style as a front runner, pace
chaser, late surger, or end closer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But Mayano Top Gun isn't a normal racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She changes her style before each race
depending on how she feels.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's become a true freewheeling specialist, able
to find her way to victory no matter how she
starts.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay, I won! ♪ Heehee. What'd you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Was I cool? If you say so, I'll hug you real tight! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Or, or! Did you maybe think... you know?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That I can still get stronger?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. I want to see you shine even brighter
while you run.

Yeah. I want to see you shine even brighter
while you run.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...! Whoa! ♪ Now I'm excited to train after this
too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, it's not easy training a gifted,
freewheeling racer like her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Different tactics means different skill sets she'll
need to learn at practice.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! So this is how I'm going to shine the
brightest...
choice_data_list: (But if I can see her smile...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look at that smile, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun! That was incredible! You ran
with such passion, it felt like you were already
excited for your next race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, you picked up on that? It's because my
engines were fueled with feelings for my
Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: I see... Interesting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Panicked, I explain what Mayano Top Gun meant
to avoid any misunderstandings.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I said what I said! Don't go making excuses
to play dumb!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can't stop it, Trainer! You can't stop us from
being together! Got it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Sometimes I'm not quite sure what to do with
her. Anyway, I clear things up with the reporter.
